GenReq_01.name: Standard General Requirements
GenReq_01.sqa: SQA National 5 (B) in English and one SQA National 5 (B) from the following: Biology Chemistry Computing science Geography Applications of Mathematics Mathematics Physics Psychology.
GenReq_01.gcse: GCSE (5) in English language or English literature, and one GCSE (5) from the following: Biology Chemistry Computing Science Geography Mathematics Physics Psychology.

GenReq_02.name: Alternative Math General Requirements
GenReq_02.sqa: SQA National 5 (B) in English and one SQA National 5 (B) from the following: Biology Chemistry Computing science Geography Lifeskills Mathematics (A grade) Mathematics Physics Psychology.
GenReq_02.gcse: GCSE (5) in English language or English literature, and one GCSE (5) from the following: Biology Chemistry Computing Science Geography Mathematics Physics Psychology.

- Biology (or Human Biology)
- Computing Science
- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics
- Physics

- Biology (or Human Biology)

- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics
- Physics

qualifications.subject_requirements_standard: A in Chemistry and A in French
qualifications.subject_requirements_minimum: A in Chemistry and A in French

qualifications.name: International Baccalaureate (IB)
qualifications.subject_requirements_standard:

- Biology
- Computer Science
- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics (AA or AI)
- Physics
qualifications.subject_requirements_minimum:

- Biology
- Computer Science
- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics (AA or AI)
- Physics

17 in Chemistry, 17 in French, and 17 in of the following:
- Biology
- Computer Science
- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics 
- Physics
Required subjects must be studied in both premiere and terminale.

- Biology
- Computer Science
- Economics
- Geography
- Mathematics 
- Physics
Required subjects must be studied in both premiere and terminale.
